creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


1) To build salome-kernel against mpich, I had to apply some 
modifications. I've put the new patch at 
<http://people.freebsd.org/~thierry/ports/salome-kernel.diff> 

2) salome-jobmanager does not build here, it failes with the following 
error: 

====================<phase 1: make checksum>==================== 
===>  salome-jobmanager-5.1.4 Bad autotool stanza: autoheader:268. 
*** Error code 1 

Stop in /a/ports/cad/salome-jobmanager. 
================================================================ 

Could you please check it?
